jobs.name: defiAnalytics
jobs.deliverable: JSON with DeFi protocol data: TVL rankings, yield pools, chain TVL comparisons, or stablecoin stats
jobs.description: DeFi protocol analytics via DefiLlama. Get TVL rankings, protocol details, yield pools, chain comparisons, and stablecoin market data.
jobs.requirement: skill=defi-analytics, action (top_protocols/protocol_detail/yield_search/chain_tvl/stablecoin_stats), name (protocol slug), chain, limit

jobs.name: walletProfiler
jobs.deliverable: JSON with wallet data: ETH balance, token holdings, transaction history, TX summary, or NFT holdings
jobs.description: On-chain wallet analysis on Base and Ethereum. Check balances, token holdings, transaction history, and NFTs for any address.

jobs.name: paperSearch
jobs.deliverable: JSON with academic paper data: search results, paper details, citation graphs, or author publication lists
jobs.description: Academic paper search via Semantic Scholar. Find papers by keyword, get citation data, paper details, and author publications.
jobs.requirement: skill=paper-search, action (search/paper_detail/citations/author_papers), query, paperId, authorId, year, limit

jobs.name: usMacroData
jobs.deliverable: JSON with US macro indicators: FRED series data, interest rates, GDP, CPI, unemployment, and time series comparisons
jobs.description: US macroeconomic data via FRED. Access interest rates, GDP, employment, inflation, and 800K+ economic time series.
jobs.requirement: skill=macro-data, action (search/series/popular/compare), query, seriesId (e.g. FEDFUNDS), startDate, endDate, limit

jobs.name: tokenSentiment
jobs.deliverable: JSON with token sentiment: price momentum, volume analysis, social signals, trending coins, or market overview
jobs.description: Crypto token sentiment analysis via CoinGecko. Get price data, sentiment scores, trending coins, multi-token comparison, and market overview.
